mapper.select: SELECT order_metrics.cumulativePaidAmount, order_metrics.cumulativePaidOrderCount, order_metrics.todayPaidAmount, order_metrics.todayPaidOrderCount, order_metrics.pendingShipmentOrderCount, order_metrics.pendingReceiptOrderCount, after_sale_metrics.pendingAfterSaleCount, after_sale_metrics.processingAfterSaleCount FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cumulativePaidAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cumulativePaidOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND pay_time >= CURRENT_DATE() AND pay_time < DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN pay_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayPaidAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 AND pay_time >= CURRENT_DATE() AND pay_time < DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayPaidOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingShipmentOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_RECEIPT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingReceiptOrderCount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0) order_metrics CROSS JOIN (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_status IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAfterSaleCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_status = 'PROCESSING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS processingAfterSaleCount FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0) after_sale_metrics

SELECT order_metrics.paidAmount, order_metrics.paidOrderCount, order_metrics.averageOrderAmount, after_sale_metrics.refundAmount, after_sale_metrics.afterSaleApplyCount, risk_metrics.returnRefundQuantity FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS paidAmount, COUNT(1) AS paidOrderCount, COALESCE(AVG(pay_amount), 0) AS averageOrderAmount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime}) order_metrics CROSS JOIN (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED') THEN refund_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refundAmount, COUNT(1) AS afterSaleApplyCount FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime}) after_sale_metrics CROSS JOIN (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN risk.order_item_id IS NOT NULL THEN moi.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS returnRefundQuantity FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON mo.id = moi.order_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT order_item_id FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND after_sale_type = 'RETURN_REFUND' AND after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED')) risk ON risk.order_item_id = moi.id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND moi.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND mo.pay_time >= #{startTime} AND mo.pay_time < #{endTime}) risk_metrics

SELECT COUNT(1) AS createdOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN paid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paidOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingPaymentOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('CANCELLED', 'EXPIRED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS closedOrderCount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time < #{endTime}

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN deliver_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, pay_time, deliver_time) END) / 3600, 1), 0) AS averageShipmentHours, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN deliver_time IS NOT NULL AND receive_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, deliver_time, receive_time) END) / 3600, 1), 0) AS averageReceiptHours, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND pay_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdueShipmentOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PENDING_RECEIPT' AND deliver_time IS NOT NULL AND deliver_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdueReceiptOrderCount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime}

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN audit_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, apply_time, audit_time) END) / 3600, 1), 0) AS averageAuditHours, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN complete_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, apply_time, complete_time) END) / 3600, 1), 0) AS averageCompleteHours, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_status = 'PENDING' AND apply_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdueAuditCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING') AND apply_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 72 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdueCompleteCount FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime}

SELECT after_sale_status AS status, COUNT(1) AS count FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY after_sale_status ORDER BY count DESC, after_sale_status

SELECT apply_reason AS reason, COUNT(1) AS count FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} AND apply_reason IS NOT NULL AND apply_reason != '' GROUP BY apply_reason ORDER BY count DESC, apply_reason

SELECT moi.product_id AS productId, MAX(moi.product_name) AS productName, MAX(moi.image_url) AS productImage, COALESCE(SUM(moi.quantity), 0) AS soldQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(moi.total_price), 0) AS paidAmount FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON mo.id = moi.order_id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND moi.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND mo.pay_time >= #{startTime} AND mo.pay_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY moi.product_id ORDER BY soldQuantity DESC, paidAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT moi.product_id AS productId, MAX(moi.product_name) AS productName, MAX(moi.image_url) AS productImage, COALESCE(SUM(moi.quantity), 0) AS soldQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN risk.orderItemId IS NOT NULL THEN moi.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS returnRefundQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN risk.orderItemId IS NOT NULL THEN risk.refundAmount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refundAmount FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON mo.id = moi.order_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT mas.order_item_id AS orderItemId, MAX(mas.refund_amount) AS refundAmount FROM mall_after_sale mas WHERE mas.is_deleted = 0 AND mas.after_sale_type = 'RETURN_REFUND' AND mas.after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY mas.order_item_id) risk ON risk.orderItemId = moi.id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND moi.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND mo.pay_time >= #{startTime} AND mo.pay_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY moi.product_id HAVING returnRefundQuantity > 0 ORDER BY returnRefundQuantity DESC, soldQuantity DESC, refundAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, #{groupFormat}) AS label, COUNT(1) AS paidOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS paidAmount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, #{groupFormat}) ORDER BY label

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(apply_time, #{groupFormat}) AS label, COUNT(1) AS afterSaleApplyCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED') THEN refund_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refundAmount FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(apply_time, #{groupFormat}) ORDER BY label
